action_descriptions.Support_Routing_or_Safe_Space: High-support recommendation family focused on safe space, human support, and rapid coping stabilization.
action_descriptions.Grounding_and_Coping: Recommendation family focused on immediate grounding and coping techniques.
action_descriptions.Coping_Skill_Training: Recommendation family focused on building coping skills and relapse-prevention techniques.
action_descriptions.Coping_Prompt: Short recommendation family for immediate coping prompt or micro-intervention.
action_descriptions.Routine_and_Progress: Recommendation family focused on recovery routines, structure, and progress reinforcement.
action_descriptions.Motivational_Message: Recommendation family focused on motivation, encouragement, and continued abstinence support.
